name: journal-sampling
description: Deterministic journal extraction and audit sample selection guided by Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Extract varied journals and create reproducible audit samples in Italian, English, French, or German.
interface.longDescription: Codex workflow for audit journal sampling across variable Excel, CSV, print-style Excel, and text PDF formats. Codex inspects files, proposes a mapping recipe, asks only for non-inferable mapping or sampling assumptions, and runs deterministic scripts to normalize rows and automatically generate the natural full package: reproducible sample, XLSX/CSV where available, diagnostics, audit trail, and Codex review. Supports working locales it/en/fr/de with separate source-document language assumptions.
defaultPrompt: Use Journal Sampling on the folder I provide.
Infer working language, source-document language, and mappings where possible; ask only for essential ambiguities, then generate sample, diagnostics, audit trail, and review package.
Keep extraction and sampling deterministic: use the plugin scripts, not opaque model decisions.
